title: How to evaluate rerankers — NDCG, MRR, and labelled queries | reranker.uk
description: Practical guide to evaluating rerank models: build a labelled query set, measure NDCG@k and MRR, compare before/after reranking, and regression-test pipeline changes.
og_description: NDCG, MRR, labelled queries, and regression tests for rerank models.
